extract: If you were looking for the move that is known as Low Kick in English, see Low Kick. Low Sweep (Japanese: ローキック Low Kick) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM47 from Generation V to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM75 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM27 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM039 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM113 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
